metadata.description: Clinical-grade Apple Health data analysis with 20 peer-reviewed statistical methods and 35+ SVG visualizations

plugins.name: apple-health-analysis
plugins.description: Deep analysis of Apple Health export data using Granger Causality, Transfer Entropy, CCM, Sample Entropy, DFA, Kovatchev glucose indices, Cosinor analysis, Bayesian change points, and biological age estimation. Generates clinical-quality HTML reports with 35+ SVG charts.
